title: ChiralityPolicy
description: Policy controlling how chirality decompositions are computed, reported, and used for candidate demotion in the Phase IV fermionic pipeline.

policyId.description: Unique identifier for this chirality policy

chiralProjectorConvention.description: Sign convention for chiral projectors. 'left-is-minus' (east-coast): P_L=(1-Gamma_chi)/2, P_R=(1+Gamma_chi)/2. 'left-is-plus' (west-coast): P_L=(1+Gamma_chi)/2, P_R=(1-Gamma_chi)/2. This is a branch parameter — must be recorded on every FermionModeRecord so chirality labels are unambiguous across runs.

chiralImbalanceThreshold.description: Maximum allowed chiral imbalance |L-R|/(L+R) before a mode is flagged

reportChiralDecomposition.description: Whether to include full chirality decomposition in fermion mode records. Has no effect when the spinor spec declares chiralityApplicable=false (odd dimY).

skipChiralityForOddDimY.description: When true, all chirality analysis is skipped if the spinor spec has chiralityApplicable=false (odd-dimensional Y — product of all gammas is proportional to identity, no Weyl decomposition exists). When false, an error is raised if chirality is requested on an odd-dimensional space. Default: true.

demoteOnChiralInstability.description: Whether to demote candidates when chirality profile is unstable across branches

chiralStabilityWindowFraction.description: Maximum fractional variation in chiral balance across branches for a stable candidate

includeVectorComponents.description: Whether to compute and report left/right chirality component vectors
